testcase.name: SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-1 · /s/<deeplink> + valid local JWT → 占位页直接渲染 · BootstrapGate 跳过 (T04 占位页负责调后端)
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-2 · resolve schema 篡改 (decision="WTF") → zod reject + fallback /welcome
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-3 · resolve 慢响应 6s → 5s timeout → 无 JWT fallback /welcome
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-4 · JWT 前缀篡改 → decodeJwt 抛 → 当本地无 JWT 处理 → 调后端
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-A · jwt_local_valid_no_resolve_call → /home AND 0 backend call
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-B · no_jwt_resolve_returns_landing → /welcome (真后端打通)
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-C · jwt_expired_resolve_returns_login → /auth/login?redirect=...
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-D · resolve_500_offline_with_stale_jwt → /home (stale tolerance)
